access_key_id_to_look_up: Access key ID to look up
arn_of_the_assumed_role_assume_role_only: ARN of the assumed role (assume_role only)
arn_of_the_calling_entity_get_caller_ide: ARN of the calling entity (get_caller_identity only)
arn_of_the_role_to_assume: ARN of the role to assume
assumed_role_id_with_session_name_assume: Assumed role ID with session name (assume_role only)
call_aws_sts_to_assume_a_role_and: Call AWS STS to assume a role and obtain temporary credentials for a target account. Use for cross-account access in a workflow.
connect_to_aws_security_token_service: Connect to AWS Security Token Service
integrate_aws_sts_into_the_workflow_assu: Integrate AWS STS into the workflow. Assume roles, get temporary credentials, verify caller identity, and look up access key information.
json_iam_session_policy_to_restrict_perm: JSON IAM session policy to restrict permissions
percentage_of_allowed_policy_size_used_a: Percentage of allowed policy size used (assume_role only)
session_name_for_the_assumed_role: Session name for the assumed role
source_identity_set_on_the_role_session_: Source identity set on the role session (assume_role only)
unique_identifier_of_the_calling_entity_: Unique identifier of the calling entity (get_caller_identity only)
use_aws_sts_get_access_key_info_to: Use AWS STS get access key info to resolve which account an access key ID belongs to. Use for incident triage of leaked or unexpected keys.
use_aws_sts_get_caller_identity_to_confi: Use AWS STS get caller identity to confirm which account, user, or role the current credentials resolve to. Use to validate setup and debug auth issues.
use_aws_sts_to_mint_short_lived_session: Use AWS STS to mint short-lived session credentials, optionally backed by an MFA token, for IAM-user workflows that require MFA. Use for time-boxed elevated sessions.
